title: metrosideros decurrens
intro: Metrosideros decurrens, also known as the New Zealand rata, is a flowering plant native to New Zealand. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to reduce inflammation and promote wound healing. The plant's leaves and bark are used in herbal preparations, which are said to have various health benefits, including reducing fever and soothing sore throats. In traditional Maori medicine, Metrosideros decurrens is used to make teas, infusions, and poultices, showcasing its versatility in promoting overall well-being.
